texto: It shouldn’t be about getting famous. It shouldn’t be about the size of your following. It should be about the way in which you connect with people in the world around you. It’s about finding what you’re truly passionate about, and letting that guide you. Fame is fleeting. But if you’re really lucky, doing what you love can last forever.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Justine Ezarik sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “It shouldn’t be about getting famous. It shouldn’t be about the size of your following. It should…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, following, ijustine, útil em momentos de ijustine e justine-ezarik.
